properties.Test Case: Launch Bloom from File Explorer (that is, by opening some .bloomCollection), leave Explorer open, then rename the collection.
properties.Steps: Launch Bloom from File Explorer (that is, by opening some .bloomCollection), leave Explorer open, then rename the collection.

properties.Test Case: Publish your book in a variety of formats and try to save the file to a Bloom Collection folder or subfolder. A message will appear like this. Try saving to a folder under \Document called \Bloom Saved Files. This should be allowed.
properties.Steps: Publish your book in a variety of formats and try to save the file to a Bloom Collection folder or subfolder. A message will appear like this. Try saving to a folder under \Document called \Bloom Saved Files. This should be allowed.

properties.Test Case: BloomPUB tab: Make a new book. Check Book Settings: BloomPUB. The setting should be set to 1280x720. Close settings. From Bloom Team\Testing\Materials for Bloom Editor Testing\Images\4K Images, add "1 Samuel.jpg" and "2 Dylan.jpg" to the book and then publish the book to BlooomPUB with a variety of Image Resolutions and save to disk. Unzip the saved BloomPUBs and verify the size of the images matches this screenshot. Upload to blorg (use draft), wait for Harvesting, download the BloomPUB artifact and confirm that images there follow the same file sizes.
properties.Steps: BloomPUB tab: Make a new book. Check Book Settings: BloomPUB. The setting should be set to 1280x720. Close settings. From Bloom Team\Testing\Materials for Bloom Editor Testing\Images\4K Images, add "1 Samuel.jpg" and "2 Dylan.jpg" to the book and then publish the book to BlooomPUB with a variety of Image Resolutions and save to disk. Unzip the saved BloomPUBs and verify the size of the images matches this screenshot. Upload to blorg (use draft), wait for Harvesting, download the BloomPUB artifact and confirm that images there follow the same file sizes.

properties.Test Case: Cover tab: Make a collection with languages English, French and German. Download one of the open bible books like this one. Make a derivative. Open Book Settings: Cover. You should see this. Try publishing with a) English only; b) English + German; c) English + French; d) English + French + German. Ensure BloomPUB preview and its output (in BloomPUB Viewer and Bloom Reader) reflect these choices. Confirm on Blorg READ. Confirm PDF. Hide Topic and confirm output in several output choices: BloomPUB preview, PDF, Web. Ensure English can not be deselected.
properties.Steps: Cover tab: Make a collection with languages English, French and German. Download one of the open bible books like this one. Make a derivative. Open Book Settings: Cover. You should see this. Try publishing with a) English only; b) English + German; c) English + French; d) English + French + German. Ensure BloomPUB preview and its output (in BloomPUB Viewer and Bloom Reader) reflect these choices. Confirm on Blorg READ. Confirm PDF. Hide Topic and confirm output in several output choices: BloomPUB preview, PDF, Web. Ensure English can not be deselected.

properties.Test Case: Content Pages tab: confirm "Languages to show in normal text boxes" works and is mirrored by the "One Language" pull-down selector (above the page layout pull down) and vice-versa. Try different combinations of language selection. Ensure you can't deselect all languages. Ensure the "One Language" selector does not affect what languages appear on the front cover.
properties.Steps: Content Pages tab: confirm "Languages to show in normal text boxes" works and is mirrored by the "One Language" pull-down selector (above the page layout pull down) and vice-versa. Try different combinations of language selection. Ensure you can't deselect all languages. Ensure the "One Language" selector does not affect what languages appear on the front cover.
